items.title: Corporate report: Investing in Women Code Annual Report 2026
items.summary: Report looking at the evolution of the Code since it began in 2019, and to the launch of its new data dashboard in 2027 for its signatories.

items.title: Research shows backing female-led businesses is good for growth
items.summary: Research published today shows that women entrepreneurs have received a greater proportion of funding from Investing in Women Code signatories than the wider market.

items.title: Transparency data: DBT: ministerial overseas travel and meetings, January to March 2026
items.summary: Data on ministers’ overseas travel and meetings with external individuals and organisations.

items.title: Transparency data: DBT: special advisers' gifts, hospitality and meetings, January to March 2026
items.summary: Data on gifts and hospitality received by special advisers, and meetings they attended with senior media figures.

items.title: Eskdalemuir seismic array: revised approach to managing onshore wind turbine interference
items.summary: Proposals for an updated approach to managing onshore wind turbine interference with the Eskdalemuir seismic array.

items.title: Statutory guidance: Draft Acas code on time off for trade union duties and activities
items.summary: The draft Acas code of practice sets out revised guidance on time off and providing facilities for union duties.

items.title: Notice on the cooperative framework for Large Civil Aircraft
items.summary: Information on the continuation of tariff suspensions.

items.title: Green Paper: Future of Post Office
items.summary: We are seeking views on the future of the Post Office.

items.title: Transparency data: Post Office Capture financial redress data for 2026
items.summary: Data for 2026 on redress for postmasters impacted by the Post Office Capture software.

items.title: Transparency data: Post Office Horizon financial redress and legal costs data for 2026
items.summary: Data for 2026 on redress for postmasters impacted by the Post Office Horizon scandal.

items.title: Notice: Longer Duration Energy Storage (LoDES) Demonstration Programme: successful projects
items.summary: Projects which received funding through the Longer Duration Energy Storage Demonstration Programme Stream 1 (Phases 1 and 2) and Stream 2 (Phases 1 and 2).

items.title: Corporate Power Purchase Agreements
items.summary: This call for evidence seeks views on how to improve the GB Corporate Power Purchase Agreement market.

items.title: Corporate Power Purchase Agreements
items.summary: This call for evidence seeks views on how to improve the GB Corporate Power Purchase Agreement market.

items.title: Corporate report: Framework document between the Competition and Markets Authority and the Department for Business and Trade
items.summary: This framework document sets out the broad governance framework within which the Competition and Markets Authority (CMA) and the Department for Business and Trade (DBT) operate.

items.title: Corporate report: Memorandum of Understanding: governance of the Digital Markets Unit between DSIT and DBT
items.summary: This Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) between the Department for Science and Technology (DSIT) and the Department for Business and Trade (DBT) sets out the role of DSIT in the sponsorship arrangements of the Competition and Markets Authority (CMA) and the digital markets regime under the Digital Markets, Competition and Consumers (DMCC) Act 2024.

items.title: Accredited official statistics: Weekly road fuel prices
items.summary: Road fuel price statistics providing average UK retail 'pump' prices on a weekly basis.

items.title: Research: Electronic trade documents: small and medium-sized enterprises (SMEs) exporter research
items.summary: Research on SME and intermediary awareness and use of electronic trade documents (ETDs), and how the government and industry can support their adoption.

items.title: Research: Ambient gamma radiation dose rates across the UK
items.summary: Data received from fixed and mobile monitors measuring the ambient (background) gamma radiation dose rate across the UK.

items.title: Make Work Pay: draft code of practice on trade union right of access
items.summary: We're seeking views on a draft code of practice on the new legal framework for trade unions’ access to workplaces.

items.title: Enterprise Capital Funds Programme
items.summary: Enterprise Capital Funds (ECFs) bring together private and public money to make investments in high growth, early stage, businesses.

items.title: Shaw Trust
items.summary: Shaw Trust is a national charity that supports disabled and disadvantaged people to prepare for work, find jobs and live more independently.

items.title: Barnet Business Start-up Programme
items.summary: The programme offers one-to-one advice, mentoring, workshops and resources designed to help start up businesses succeed beyond their early stages, and support existing businesses with their growth plans.

items.title: Communities backed to lead local climate and nature action
items.summary: Bradford, Manchester, Bristol, London and Birmingham are the first cities to host annual ‘Energising Britain’ events.

items.title: Research: Energy Trends: June 2026, special feature articles
items.summary: Special feature articles on energy issues in the United Kingdom from the June 2026 edition of the quarterly statistical bulletin Energy Trends.

items.title: Research: Energy Trends: June 2026, special feature article - Hydrogen production and demand in the UK, 2022 to 2025
items.summary: Special feature article from the June 2026 edition of Energy trends statistical publication.

items.title: Stronger Communities Inspire Fund
items.summary: Resident groups or community organisations can apply for grants of up to £1,000 to help fund local projects and events.

items.title: FIRST North East
items.summary: A learning and development agency, empowering enterprise skills and entrepreneurship in collaboration with government, employers, education and community organisations.

items.title: Oil and gas: offshore environmental legislation
items.summary: Environmental regulations and guidance on offshore oil and gas exploration and production offshore gas unloading and storage and offshore carbon dioxide storage activities

items.title: Enterprise Grant Scheme - Bassetlaw
items.summary: Potential grant for people looking to start a new business or businesses in their first 3 years of trading in Bassetlaw.

items.title: Proposed refinements for Allocation Round 8 and future rounds
items.summary: We're seeking views on several refinements to ensure that the CfD continues to reflect current policy and that the scheme continues to function as originally intended.

items.title: Notice: Contracts for Difference (CfD) Allocation Round 8: standard terms and conditions
items.summary: The Standard Terms and Conditions for use in CfD Allocation Round 8 (AR8).

items.title: Guidance: Contracts for Difference (CfD) Allocation Round 8: allocation framework
items.summary: The Contract Allocation Framework sets out the rules for Contracts for Difference (CfD) Allocation Round 8 (AR8) and the eligibility requirements applicants must satisfy.

items.title: Notice: Contracts for Difference (CfD) Allocation Round 8: statutory notices
items.summary: Final statutory notices required to launch Contracts for Difference Allocation Round 8.

items.title: Extended CE marking recognition for Ecodesign regulations
items.summary: We’re seeking views on a proposal to extend recognition of CE marking for ecodesign regulations so that it applies to new measures made under ESPR.

items.title: Research: Consumer value of in-use home energy performance metrics
items.summary: Qualitative research into the value of in-use home energy performance data to consumers.

items.title: Guidance: Smart meter enabled thermal efficiency ratings (SMETER): strategic guide
items.summary: An introduction to  SMETER and its applications.

items.title: Corporate report: Annual report for 2025 on the operation of the Chemical Weapons Act 1996
items.summary: A report on the operation of the Act from 1 January 2025 to 31 December 2025.

items.title: Guidance: Domestic energy tariff reductions 2026: guidance for energy suppliers
items.summary: Guidance for energy suppliers on how to apply discounts to domestic tariffs from 1 April 2026, related to the RO to Exchequer scheme and closure of the ECO and GBIS schemes.

items.title: Decision: Peartree Hill Solar Farm: Development Consent Order, Planning Act 2008
items.summary: Decision on an application by RWE Renewables UK Solar and Storage Limited for a solar farm located in the East Riding of Yorkshire region.

items.title: Decision: Dean Moor Solar Farm: development consent order, Planning Act 2008
items.summary: Decision on an application for a solar farm by FVS Dean Moor Limited located in West Cumbria, under the Planning Act 2008.
